NAVAREA XIX 55/22
 SVALBARD/GREENLAND SEA
 1. SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM SVALRAK, ANDOEYA SPACE BASE FOR SOUNDING ROCKETS IN NY AALESUND,SVALBARD. 
 THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED 0030 TO 0600 UTC 09 TO 26 MAY 22. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE
 FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:
 A. 78-52.8N 009-00.0E.
 B. 78-30.0N 010-09.0E.
 C. 75-09.0N 003-30.0E.
 D. 74-06.0N 003-06.0W.
 E. 74-24.0N 010-00.0W.
 F. 75-45.0N 014-00.0W.
 G. 77-18.0N 013-21.0W.
 H. 78-23.4N 008-16.8W.
 2.CANCEL THIS MSG 260700 UTC MAY 22. NAVAREA XIX 55/22
 SVALBARD/GREENLAND SEA
